Lesson Components

Objectives

SMART learning objectives aligned to BC + CSTA standards

📚

Materials

Complete materials list for teachers and students

🎭

Hook

Engaging opening activity to spark curiosity

🔬

Activities

Lesson sequence: Explore, Discover, Create, Check

♿

Differentiation

3-level scaffolding: Support, Guided, Extension

📝

Assessment

Formative + summative assessments with rubrics

🌍

Systems Literacy

Connection to vision: "You are not an atom..."

🏛️

First Peoples

Indigenous perspectives and principles

🎨

Cross-Curricular

Connections to Math, LA, Arts, Social Studies

💼

Careers

👨‍🏫

📔

👨‍👩‍👧
